result.stdout:
Description:
  MCP SQL Server Tool

Usage:
  MCP.SqlServer [options]

Options:
  --port <port>                  The port to listen on for HTTP requests [default: 5200]
  --install                      Install as a service
  --uninstall                    Uninstall the service
  --service-name <service-name>  Name of the service (when installing) [default: MCPSqlServer]
  --version                      Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

Description:

  --version                      Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information
